title: Light Crispy British Chicken Stir-Fry
description: A savory, low‑calorie stir‑fry that marries classic British flavors—rich chicken stock concentrate, fresh greens, and a hint of seaweed—delivering a crisp, juicy bite.

ingredients.name: Chicken breast fillets, sliced into strips
Chicken stock concentrate powder (1 tsp) dissolved in 1 cup water
ingredients.notes: Dissolve in hot water until clear

instructions: Marinate the chicken strips in 1 tablespoon soy sauce and 1 teaspoon of the dissolved chicken stock concentrate for 5 minutes.
Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the marinated chicken and stir‑fry until it begins to brown, about 3 minutes.
Add the sliced onion, bell pepper, carrot, and broccoli; continue stir‑frying until the veggies are crisp‑tender, 4-5 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add the remaining dissolved chicken stock concentrate and a splash of water; cook for another minute, allowing the sauce to thicken slightly.
Season with salt, pepper, and lemon zest, adjusting to taste.
Remove from heat and transfer to a serving dish.
Garnish with chopped parsley if desired.
Serve hot as a solo‑dinner dish.
